description: Ari Johnson ED eICR v2: same encounter amended, measles ruled out and rubella confirmed
user:

Reason: rash illness update. The earlier suspected measles diagnosis is now ruled out after negative measles IgM. Rubella is confirmed by public health lab.

Lab: Rubella virus IgM Ab [Presence] in Serum (LOINC 5335-5) - positive, final
Meds: none
narrative: Version 2 is not a new visit; it is an amended eICR for the same encounter. The gold diff requires measles removed, rubella added, and the measles lab code retained as unchanged evidence with a changed result value not represented by code-only diff.
